name: Deferred - Obligation - 2
description: Second returns for old obligations from earlier chapters of a life.

results.description: [money -40] The old favor from {origin} was finally repaid in coin, effort, or lost opportunity.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [contact] An obligation from {origin} settled into patronage renewed, which was freedom of a particular and conditional kind.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [social 1] You discharged the old duty from {origin} well enough that others spoke of your reliability afterward.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [money -20] The obligation from {origin} was paid in work and worry rather than silver, which did not make it lighter.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [contact] The claim from {origin} ended in a relationship you would not have chosen but could still use.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [social -1] The old favor from {origin} was repaid under watchful eyes, and your dignity bore part of the price.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] What you owed from {origin} was met honorably, and the relief felt almost like affection.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [money -30] The obligation born in {origin} turned costly before it turned finished.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [contact] The old patronage from {origin} became a new line of access rather than a chain, though only barely.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [social 1] You answered the claim from {origin} so deftly that the settlement improved your standing.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [social -1] The favor from {origin} was called due in the one manner that left you looking dependent.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [contact] The obligation from {origin} closed with thanks on both sides and trust on neither.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [money -50] You learned how much had really been owed since {origin}, and the final accounting was not kind.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [bio RollTable.kC0YeELeXOdwDeaJ] The old debt of gratitude from {origin} was finally answered and ceased to trouble your sleep.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [contact] The matter from {origin} ended in a connection more durable than the debt that created it.
results.name: obligation-2

results.description: [social 1] The claim from {origin} was met so completely that no one could question your honor afterward.
results.name: obligation-2
